testcase.name: test_analyze_comments
testcase.failure:
client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x0000017247C40400>
def test_analyze_comments(client): with patch("app.routers.analysis.analyze_comments_logic") as mock_analyze: mock_analyze.return_value = {"sentiment": "positive"}
response = client.post("/scraper/analyze", json={"comments": ["Great post!", "I agree"]})
> assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests\test_analysis.py:9: AssertionError

self = <unittest.mock._patch object at 0x0000017247F49E40>
def get_original(self): target = self.getter() name = self.attribute
original = DEFAULT local = False
try: original = target.__dict__[name] except (AttributeError, KeyError): original = getattr(target, name, DEFAULT) else: local = True
if name in _builtins and isinstance(target, ModuleType): self.create = True
if not self.create and original is DEFAULT: > raise AttributeError( "%s does not have the attribute %r" % (target, name) ) E AttributeError: <module 'app.routers.company_scraper' from 'C:\\Nouri\\CODING\\Linkedin-Comments-Scraper-Demo\\backend\\app\\routers\\company_scraper.py'> does not have the attribute 'scrape_company_employees_logic'

testcase.name: test_get_group
testcase.failure:
client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x0000017247DE40A0>
def test_get_group(client): with patch("app.routers.group_scraper.get_driver") as mock_driver_cls, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.login_to_linkedin") as mock_login, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.scrape_group_members_logic") as mock_scrape:
mock_driver_cls.return_value.__enter__.return_value = MagicMock() mock_login.return_value = True mock_scrape.return_value = []
response = client.get("/scraper/group?group_url=https://linkedin.com/groups/123&email=test@example.com&password=password&max_members=10")
> assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code
tests\test_group_scraper.py:14: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_download_group_csv
testcase.failure:
client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x0000017247DE40A0>
def test_download_group_csv(client): with patch("app.routers.group_scraper.get_driver") as mock_driver_cls, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.login_to_linkedin") as mock_login, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.scrape_group_members_logic") as mock_scrape, \ patch("app.routers.group_scraper.generate_csv_stream") as mock_csv:
mock_driver_cls.return_value.__enter__.return_value = MagicMock() mock_login.return_value = True mock_scrape.return_value = [] mock_csv.return_value = iter([b"col1\n", b"val1\n"])
response = client.get("/scraper/group/download?group_url=https://linkedin.com/groups/123&email=test@example.com&password=password")
> assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code
tests\test_group_scraper.py:32: AssertionError
